skills.phrase: I still can't just move through. I want to be able to come in after sitting down and say, "Hey can I move through my window?"
Hey Claude, can you move through and remind me what I was doing by cycling through and bringing up some things, or maybe do them in the reverse order that I opened them up?
There's a thing that keeps popping up in the background. I need you to find it and get rid of it or pause it
So open up the bank in for me
The point was this: when I say Claude here with I won't be long Take a note Maurice
Cycle windows through for me, including tabs within browsers
